subject: providers and deployers
anchor_text: Providers And Deployers must not place prohibited AI practices on the Union market; non-compliance may be subject to administrative fines up to EUR 35M.

subject: providers of high-risk AI systems
anchor_text: Providers Of High-Risk Ai Systems shall maintain a documented risk management system; non-compliance may be subject to administrative fines up to EUR 15M.

subject: providers of high-risk AI systems
anchor_text: Providers Of High-Risk Ai Systems shall keep automatically generated logs; non-compliance may be subject to administrative fines up to EUR 15M.

subject: deployers of high-risk AI systems
anchor_text: Deployers Of High-Risk Ai Systems must ensure human oversight by trained personnel; non-compliance may be subject to administrative fines up to EUR 15M.

subject: providers and deployers of AI systems that interact with persons
anchor_text: Providers And Deployers Of Ai Systems That Interact With Persons shall inform natural persons that they are interacting with an AI system; non-compliance may be subject to administrative fines up to EUR 15M.

anchor_text: Providers Of General-Purpose Ai Models must draw up and maintain technical documentation; non-compliance may be subject to administrative fines up to EUR 15M.
